channel.title: 75894 on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog
channel.description: Recent content in 75894 on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog

item.title: Lego 75894 - 1967 Mini Cooper S Rally and Buggy MOC adaptation as Mini Transporter
item.description: After seeing this MOC 75894-mini-transporter, I decided to: Buy the model Lego 75894 - 1967 Mini Cooper S Rally and 2018 Mini John Cooper Works Buggy 🛒#ad Buy the instructions at the MOC URL After several times trying to pay for the instructions (which I was unable to get because PayPal complained on the web site), I decided to make my own based on what I could see, and the result, are the images you can see, the initial model which had a small driving area and no minifig could sit there and the final one which added some more options like sizing cabin for allowing a minifigure to drive, plus some other alternatives for the front facing engine area and better holding of the rear wheels area.
